meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance AI Agency
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to automate marketing and ship faster. An advanced guide for AI builders using Antigravity to solve marketing bottlenecks.
content.answer_block: Stop letting marketing gaps stall your freelance growth. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a autonomous marketing engine. This setup automates content generation, lead qualification, and project documentation, allowing you to focus purely on high-leverage engineering while your AI handles the client-facing acquisition layers.
content.intro:
You are a master of logic, a wizard of the stack, yet your client dashboard sits empty. The silent killer of any freelance career isn't bad code—it's the marketing void. You can build the world's most performant SaaS, but without a strategy to surface it, you are just another ghost in the repository. The gap between a talented developer and a successful agency owner is simply the ability to communicate value at scale.

We are shifting the paradigm today. By leveraging Claude Code as an architectural partner and Antigravity as your orchestration layer, we turn your terminal into a marketing powerhouse. No more toggling between IDEs and social platforms; we are baking your marketing strategy directly into your deployment workflow.

steps.title: Initialize the Marketing Context Layer
steps.description: Establish a dedicated .marketing directory within your project structure to house your brand voice and target persona files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project codebase and generate a brand_voice.md file that captures the technical sophistication of my SaaS, optimized for a B2B target audience.

steps.title: Hook Claude Code to Source Assets
steps.description: Grant Claude Code read-access to your codebase to ensure all marketing copy remains technically accurate and aligned with current features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated sync script that updates the marketing/features.md file whenever I modify the core API controllers.

steps.title: Configure Content Generation Pipelines
steps.description: Set up a structured prompt library that transforms raw commit logs into high-conversion social media snippets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of standardized prompt templates for Claude to turn git commits into LinkedIn update drafts that emphasize developer-to-developer value.

steps.title: Automate Lead Qualification Logic
steps.description: Inject an AI-driven filtering layer into your contact forms using Claude Code to analyze incoming leads against your ideal client profile.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for a lead-scoring function that evaluates incoming project inquiries based on technical complexity and budget parameters defined in my project scope.

steps.title: Deploy the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Create a continuous improvement cycle where client feedback is fed back into the marketing engine to refine future messaging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a CLI command that ingests client feedback CSV files and suggests 3 specific adjustments to our marketing copy based on the recurring pain points identified.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's memory feature to persist your 'Client Persona' across different projects to maintain brand consistency.
Never manually write PR descriptions; create a custom Claude command that pulls the Antigravity summary and formats it as a marketing-ready changelog.
Treat your marketing copy like code; store it in Git and use Claude Code to run 'diffs' on your messaging effectiveness over time.
Use Antigravity to generate 'technical marketing' assets like whitepapers directly from your codebase documentation to establish instant authority.
Automate your 'cold outreach' by having Claude Code analyze your own codebase to identify specific companies that would benefit from your unique tech stack.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's marketing footprint using the Antigravity scan, then set up your first automated content pipeline with Claude Code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to bridge the gap between building and selling. Stop waiting for clients to find you and start deploying your own marketing infrastructure. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
